heading: Separability
label: 2405 Separability
text: If any provision of this chapter or the application of any provision to any circumstances or persons shall be held invalid, the validity of the remainder of this chapter, and of the applicability of such provision to other circumstances or persons shall not be affected thereby.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 87–19575 Stat. 424section 2151 of this titleSept. 4, 1961
